segments.arabic: أَمْ كَثِيرَ مَا مِنْهُ نَجَّيْتَ وَعَافَيْتَ
segments.translation: or the numerous misfortunes from which You have saved and relieved?
segments.transliteration: am kathira ma minhu najjayta wa `afayta

segments.translation: O Beloved of those who endear themselves to Him!

segments.arabic: وَيَا قُرَّةَ عَيْنِ مَنْ لاَذَ بِكَ وَٱنْقَطَعَ إِلَيْكَ
segments.translation: O delight of the eyes of those who resort to Him and communicate Him incessantly!
segments.transliteration: wa ya qurrata `ayni man ladha bika wa inqata`a ilayka

segments.translation: You are the All-benevolent and we are the malevolent.

segments.arabic: فَتَجَاوَزْ يَا رَبِّ عَنْ قَبِيحِ مَا عِنْدَنَا بِجَمِيلِ مَا عِنْدَكَ
segments.translation: So, overlook, O Lord, the offensive that we hold by means of the good that You hold.
segments.transliteration: fatajawaz ya rabbi `an qabihi ma `indana bijamili ma `indaka

segments.arabic: وَأَيُّ جَهْلٍ يَا رَبِّ لاَ يَسَعُهُ جُودُكَ
segments.translation: There is not definitely any foolishness that can be uncovered by Your liberality.
segments.transliteration: wa ayyu jahlin ya rabbi la yasa`uhu juduka

segments.arabic: أَوْ أَيُّ زَمَانٍ أَطْوَلُ مِنْ أَنَاتِكَ
segments.translation: There is no period that may be longer than Your tolerance.
segments.transliteration: aw ayyu zamanin atwalu min anatika

segments.arabic: وَمَا قَدْرُ أَعْمَالِنَا فِي جَنْبِ نِعَمِكَ
segments.translation: What value remains for our deeds if compared to Your favors?
segments.transliteration: wa ma qadaru a`malina fi janbi ni`amika

segments.arabic: وَكَيْفَ نَسْتَكْثِرُ أَعْمَالاً نُقَابِلُ بِهَا كَرَمَكَ
segments.translation: How can we ever deem much any deeds if compared to Your generosity?
segments.transliteration: wa kayfa nastakthiru a`malan nuqabilu biha karamaka

segments.arabic: بَلْ كَيْفَ يَضِيقُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْمُذْنِبِينَ مَا وَسِعَهُمْ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.translation: Moreover, how may Your broad mercy be narrow for the guilty?
segments.transliteration: bal kayfa yadiqu `ala almudhnibina ma wasi`ahum min rahmatika

segments.translation: O Extensive Forgiver!
O He Who extends both hands with mercy!
By Your Majesty I swear, O my Lord,

segments.arabic: لَوْ نَهَرْتَنِي مَا بَرِحْتُ مِنْ بَابِكَ
segments.translation: even if you chide me, I shall never leave Your Door
segments.transliteration: law nahartani ma barihtu min babika

segments.translation: and I shall never stop flattering You!

segments.arabic: لِمَا ٱنْتَهَىٰ إِلَيَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَعْرِفَةِ بِجُودِكَ وَكَرَمِكَ
segments.translation: This is because I have full acquaintance with Your (indescribable) generosity and bounty.
segments.transliteration: lima intaha ilayya min alma`rifati bijudika wa karamika

segments.translation: Verily, You do whatever You will.

segments.arabic: تُعَذِّبُ مَنْ تَشَاءُ بِمَا تَشَاءُ كَيْفَ تَشَاءُ
segments.translation: You punish whomsoever You want however You want by whatever means You want.
segments.transliteration: tu`adhdhibu man tasha'u bima tasha'u kayfa tasha'u

segments.arabic: وَتَرْحَمُ مَنْ تَشَاءُ بِمَا تشَاءُ كَيْفَ تَشَاءُ
segments.translation: You have mercy upon whomsoever You want however You want by whatever means You want.
segments.transliteration: wa tarhamu man tasha'u bima tasha'u kayfa tasha'u

segments.translation: None is supposed to interrogate You for whatever You do,
non can ever contend with You about Your authority,
none can ever have a share in that which You hold,
none can ever object to Your decisions,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَعْتَرِضُ عَلَيْكَ أَحَدٌ فِي تَدْبِيرِكَ
segments.translation: and none can ever protest against that which You administer.
segments.transliteration: wa la ya`taridu `alayka ahadun fi tadbirika

segments.translation: To You alone are creation and determination.
Blessed be Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ هٰذَا مَقَامُ مَنْ لاَذَ بِكَ
segments.translation: O my Lord, this is the manner of one who seeks Your shelter,
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi hadha maqamu man ladha bika

segments.translation: resorts to Your liberality,
and has been accustomed to be included with Your benevolence and graciousness.

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ ٱلْجَوَادُ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَضِيقُ عَفْوُكَ
segments.translation: You are certainly the All-munificent Whose amnesty never shrinks,
segments.transliteration: wa anta aljawadu alladhi la yadiqu `afwuka

segments.translation: Whose favor never reduces,
and Whose mercy never diminishes.
We have full confidence in You on account of Your eternal habit of pardons,
segments.transliteration: wa qad tawaththaqna minka bilssafhi alqadimi

segments.translation: boundless kindness, and limitless mercy.

segments.arabic: أَفَتُرَاكَ يَا رَبِّ تُخْلِفُ ظُنُونَنَا أَوْ تُخَيِّبُ آمَالَنَا
segments.translation: Is it ever expectable, O Lord, that You may disappoint us or may act on the contrary of our expectations?
segments.transliteration: afaturaka ya rabbi tukhlifu zununana aw tukhayyibu amalana

segments.arabic: كَلاَّ يَا كَرِيمُ فَلَيْسَ هٰذَا ظَنُّنَا بِكَ
segments.translation: No, never. O Compassionate! This is neither our idea about You
segments.transliteration: kalla ya karimu falaysa hadha zannuna bika

segments.translation: nor our desire from You!

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ إِنَّ لَنَا فِيكَ أَمَلاً طَوِيلاً كَثِيراً
segments.translation: O my Lord, verily we have hope, big and large, in You.
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi inna lana fika amalan tawilan kathiran

segments.translation: Verily, we have great expectation in You.

segments.arabic: عَصَيْنَاكَ وَنَحْنُ نَرْجُو أَنْ تَسْتُرَ عَلَيْنَا
segments.translation: Albeit that we have disobeyed You, we still hope that You will cover our faults.

segments.arabic: وَدَعَوْنَاكَ وَنَحْنُ نَرْجُو أَنْ تَسْتَجِيبَ لَنَا
segments.translation: We have prayed You hoping that You will respond to us.
segments.transliteration: wa da`awnaka wa nahnu narju an tastajiba lana

segments.translation: So, give success to our hopes, O our Lord!
We now know for sure what we deserve in exchange of our deeds.

segments.arabic: وَلكِنْ عِلْمُكَ فِينَا وَعِلْمُنَا بِأَنَّكَ لاَ تَصْرِفُنَا عَنْكَ
segments.translation: Yet, Your knowledge about us and our knowledge that You shall never let us down
segments.transliteration: wa lakin `ilmuka fina wa `ilmuna bi'annaka la tasrifuna `anka

segments.translation: have urged us to desire for You
even if we do not deserve Your mercy.
segments.transliteration: wa in kunna ghayra mustawjibina lirahmatika

segments.arabic: فَأَنْتَ أَهْلٌ أَنْ تَجُودَ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ ٱلْمُذْنِبِينَ بِفَضْلِ سَعَتِكَ
segments.translation: However, You are the worthiest of conferring upon us and upon the guilty with the grace of Your broad benevolence.
segments.transliteration: fa'anta ahlun an tajuda `alayna wa `ala almudhnibina bifadli sa`atika

segments.translation: So, confer upon us with that of which You are worthy

segments.arabic: وَجُدْ عَلَيْنَا فَإِنَّا مُحْتَاجُونَ إِلَىٰ نَيْلِكَ
segments.translation: and act generously towards us, for we are in need for Your conferral.
segments.transliteration: wa jud `alayna fa'inna muhtajuna ila naylika

segments.translation: O Oft-Forgiving, in Your light have we found the right path,
due to Your favor have we dispensed with the others,
and Your grace have we experienced in morns and eves.
Our sins are before You;
we beseech You, O Allah, to forgive them and we repent before You.
segments.transliteration: nastaghfiruka alllahumma minha wa natubu ilayka

segments.translation: Whilst You show affection to us through Your graces, we take ourselves away from You through our sins.
segments.transliteration: tatahabbabu ilayna bilnni`ami wa nu`ariduka bildhdhunubi

segments.translation: You good descend upon us
while our evildoing ascends to You.

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَزَلْ وَلاَ يَزَالُ مَلَكٌ كَرِيمٌ يَأْتِيكَ عَنَّا بِعَمَلٍ قَبِيحٍ
segments.translation: Albeit that a noble angel always carries to You our offensive deeds,
segments.transliteration: wa lam yazal wa la yazalu malakun karimun ya'tika `anna bi`amalin qabihin

segments.arabic: فَلاَ يَمْنَعُكَ ذٰلِكَ مِنْ أَنْ تَحُوطَنَا بِنِعَمِكَ
segments.translation: this has never made you stop encompassing us with Your graces
segments.transliteration: fala yamna`unka dhalika min an tahutana bini`amika

segments.translation: and conferring upon us your elegances.
Glory be to You! How Forbearing, Magnificent,
and Generous You are at all times!
Sacred be Your Names.
Grand be Your praise.
Munificent be Your deeds and acts.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ إِلٰهِي أَوْسَعُ فَضْلاً وَأَعْظَمُ حِلْماً
segments.translation: You, O my God, are too expansive in graciousness and too great in forbearance
segments.transliteration: anta ilahi awsa`u fadlan wa a`zamu hilman

segments.translation: to punish me for my evildoings and sins.
segments.transliteration: min an tuqayisani bifi`li wa khati'ati

segments.translation: (Here I am asking for) Amnesty! Amnesty! Amnesty!
O my Lord! O my Lord! O my Lord!
O Allah, cause us to be engaged with mentioning You,
save us from Your wrath,
deliver us from Your torture,
grant us Your donations,
confer upon us with Your grace,
and provide us the opportunity to go on pilgrimage to Your House
and to visit the tomb of Your Prophet,
may Your blessings, mercy,

segments.arabic: وَمَغْفِرَتُكَ وَرِضْوَانُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.translation: forgiveness, and pleasure be upon him and his Household.
segments.transliteration: wa maghfiratuka wa ridwanuka `alayhi wa `ala ahli baytihi

segments.translation: Verily, You are nigh and ready to answer.
Bless us with acting upon the obedience to You,
and receive us following the rule of You and Your Prophet,
segments.transliteration: wa tawaffana `ala millatika wa sunnati nabiyyika

segments.translation: blessings of Allah be on him and on his Household.
O Allah, forgive me and my parents,
and have mercy on them as they cared for me when I was little.
Reward them generously for their good deeds
and forgive their sins.
O Allah, forgive the faithful men and women,
be they alive or dead,
and join us together in bliss and happiness.
segments.transliteration: wa tabi` baynana wa baynahum bilkhayrati

segments.translation: O Allah, forgive our living and dead persons,
our present and absent ones,
our male and female ones,
our infants and adults,
and our free ones and slaves.
Liars are those who ascribe rivals to Allah;
they have wandered far astray
and they will have suffered a manifest loss.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.translation: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

segments.translation: seal my life with decency,

segments.arabic: وَٱكْفِنِي مَا أَهَمَّنِي مِنْ أَمْرِ دُنْيَايَ وَآخِرَتِي
segments.translation: help me overcome all that which aggrieves me in this world as well as the Hereafter,
segments.transliteration: wa ikfini ma ahammani min amri dunyaya wa akhirati

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُسَلِّطْ عَلَيَّ مَنْ لاَ يَرْحَمُنِي
segments.translation: do not let him who does not have mercy upon me prevail on me,
segments.transliteration: wa la tusallit `alayya man la yarhamuni

segments.translation: always keep on me an everlasting, protective covering,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَسْلُبْنِي صَالِحَ مَا أَنْعَمْتَ بِهِ عَلَيَّ
segments.translation: do not divest me of the well-mannered graces that You have conferred upon me,
segments.transliteration: wa la taslubni saliha ma an`amta bihi `alayya

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي مِنْ فَضْلِكَ رِزْقاً وَاسِعاً حَلاَلاً طَيِّباً
segments.translation: and provide me, out of Your grace, with lawfully gotten, delightful sustenance.
segments.transliteration: warzuqni min fadlika rizqan wasi`an halalan tayyiban

segments.translation: O Allah, keep me under Your alert surveillance,
protect me with Your support,
take care of me with Your comprehensive care,
grant me opportunity to go on pilgrimage to Your Holy House

segments.arabic: فِي عَامِنَا هٰذَا وَفِي كُلِّ عَامٍ
segments.translation: in this year as well as all coming years,

segments.arabic: وَزِيَارَةَ قَبْرِ نَبِيِّكَ وَٱلأَئِمَّةِ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلامُ
segments.translation: grant me to go on pilgrimage to the tombs of Your Prophet and the Imams, peace be upon them,
segments.transliteration: wa ziyarata qabri nabiyyika wal-a'immati `alayhim alssalamu

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُخْلِنِي يَا رَبِّ مِنْ تِلْكَ ٱلْمَشَاهِدِ ٱلشَّرِيفَةِ
segments.translation: and do not deprive me, O Lord, of such honorable scenes
segments.transliteration: wa la tukhlini ya rabbi min tilka almashahidi alshsharifati

segments.translation: and noble situations.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ تُبْ عَلَيَّ حَتَّىٰ لاَ أَعْصِيَكَ
segments.translation: O Allah, accept my repentance so that I will not disobey you ever again,
inspire me with goodness, good-doing,
segments.transliteration: wa alhimni alkhayra wa al`amala bihi

segments.translation: and fear of You all over day and night as long as You keep me alive.
segments.transliteration: wa khashyataka billayli wa alnnahari ma abqaytani

segments.translation: O Lord of the worlds!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي كُلَّمَا قُلْتُ قَدْ تَهَيَّأْتُ وَتَعَبَّأْتُ
segments.translation: O Allah, each time I decide to prepare and ready myself
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni kullama qultu qad tahayya'tu wa ta`abba'tu

segments.translation: for offering prayers before You and conversing confidentially with You,
segments.transliteration: wa qumtu lilssalati bayna yadayka wa najaytuka

segments.arabic: أَلْقَيْتَ عَلَيَّ نُعَاساً إِذَا أَنَا صَلَّيْتُ
segments.translation: You throw on me slumber whenever I stand for prayer;
thus, You deprive me of conversing with You confidentially whenever I try so.
segments.transliteration: wa salabtani munajataka idha ana najaytu

segments.arabic: مَالِي كُلَّمَا قُلْتُ قَدْ صَلُحَتْ سَرِيرَتِي
segments.translation: What is the wrong with me? Whenever I feel that my inner self has become decent
segments.transliteration: mali kullama qultu qad saluhat sarirati

segments.translation: and that my session has become similar to the sessions of those who turn much to You,
segments.transliteration: wa qaruba min majalisi alttawwabina majlisi

segments.arabic: عَرَضَتْ لِي بَلِيَّةٌ أَزَالَتْ قَدَمِي وَحَالَتْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ خِدْمَتِكَ
segments.translation: a misfortune would inflict me, causing my feet to be shaken, and standing against my showing servitude to You.
segments.transliteration: `aradat li baliyyatun azalat qadami wa halat bayni wa bayna khidmatika

segments.translation: O my Master, perhaps You have pushed me away from Your door
and You have dismissed me from Your service!

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي مُسْتَخِفّاً بِحَقِّكَ فَأَقْصَيْتَنِي
segments.translation: Or, perhaps, You have noticed that I belittled the duties that You have made incumbent upon me, and You thus set me aside!
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka ra'aytani mustakhiffan bihaqqika fa'aqsaytani

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي مُعْرِضاً عَنْكَ فَقَلَيْتَنِي
segments.translation: Or, perhaps, You have seen me turning away from You and thus You have turned away from me!

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ وَجَدْتَنِي فِي مَقَامِ ٱلْكَاذِبِينَ فَرَفَضْتَنِي
segments.translation: Or, perhaps, You have found me in the manner of the liars and thus You have rejected me!
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka wajadtani fi maqami alkadhibina farafadtani

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي غَيْرَ شَاكِرٍ لِنَعْمَائِكَ فَحَرَمْتَنِي
segments.translation: Or, perhaps, You have observed me showing no gratitude for Your graces and thus You have deprived me of them!
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka ra'aytani ghayra shakirin lina`ma'ika faharamtani

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ فَقَدْتَنِي مِنْ مَجَالِسِ ٱلْعُلَمَاءِ فَخَذَلْتَنِي
segments.translation: Or, perhaps, You have not found me in the meetings of the scholars and thus You have let me down!
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka faqadtani min majalisi al`ulama'i fakhadhaltani

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي فِي ٱلْغَافِلِينَ فَمِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ آيَسْتَنِي
segments.translation: Or, perhaps, You have seen me among the inattentive ones and thus You have made me despair of Your mercy!
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka ra'aytani filghafilina famin rahmatika ayastani

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي آلِفَ مَجَالِسِ ٱلْبَطَّالِينَ فَبَيْنِي وَبَيْنَهُمْ خَلَّيْتَنِي
segments.translation: Or, perhaps, You have found me fond of the sessions of the wrongdoers and thus You have referred me to them!
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka ra'aytani alafu majalisa albattalina fabayni wa baynahum khallaytani

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ لَمْ تُحِبَّ أَنْ تَسْمَعَ دُعَائِي فَبَاعَدْتَنِي
segments.translation: Or, perhaps, You have not willed to hear my prayers and thus You have kept me away from You!
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka lam tuhibba an tasma`a du`a'i faba`adtani

segments.translation: Or, perhaps, You have punished me for my offenses and sins!
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka bijurmi wa jarirati kafaytani

segments.arabic: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ بِقِلَّةِ حَيَائِي مِنْكَ جَازَيْتَنِي
segments.translation: Or, perhaps, You have penalized me for my shamelessness!
segments.transliteration: aw la`allaka biqillati haya'i minka jazaytani

segments.arabic: فَإِنْ عَفَوْتَ يَا رَبِّ فَطَالَمَا عَفَوْتَ عَنِ ٱلْمُذْنِبِينَ قَبْلِي
segments.translation: If You forgive me, O Lord, then You have occasionally forgiven the sinners like me,
segments.transliteration: fa'in `afawta ya rabbi fatalama `afawta `an almudhnibina qabli

segments.arabic: لأَنَّ كَرَمَكَ أَيْ رَبِّ يَجِلُّ عَنْ مُكَافَاةِ ٱلْمُقَصِّرِينَ
segments.translation: because Your compassion, O my Lord, is too great to be compared to the punishment of the negligent.
segments.transliteration: li'anna karamaka ay rabbi yajillu `an mukafati almuqassirina

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا عَائِذٌ بِفَضْلِكَ هَارِبٌ مِنْكَ إِلَيْكَ
segments.translation: I am now seeking refuge with Your generosity and fleeing for You to You,
segments.transliteration: wa ana `a'idhun bifadlika haribun minka ilayka

segments.arabic: مُتَنَجِّزٌ مَا وَعَدْتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّفْحِ عَمَّنْ أَحْسَنَ بِكَ ظَنّاً
segments.translation: hoping for the promise that You have taken as regards pardoning those who have good idea about You.
segments.transliteration: mutanajjizun ma wa`adta min alssafhi `amman ahsana bika zannan

segments.translation: O my God, You are too expansive in favor

segments.arabic: وَأَعْظَمُ حِلْماً مِنْ أَنْ تُقَايِسَنِي بِعَمَلِي
segments.translation: and too great in forbearance to punish me for my deed
segments.transliteration: wa a`zamu hilman min an tuqayisani bi`amali

segments.translation: or to chastise me for my sin.

segments.arabic: وَمَا أَنَا يَا سَيِّدِي وَمَا خَطَرِي
segments.translation: What am I? O Master! What is my weight?
segments.transliteration: wa ma ana ya sayyidi wa ma khatari

segments.translation: Excuse me out of Your favor, O my Master,
act to me charitably our of Your pardon,
cover me with Your covering,
and let off chiding me out of the liberality of Your Face.
O my Master! I am the little that You have brought up,
I am the ignorant that You have taught,
I am the straying that You have guided,
I am the humble that You have given rise,
I am the afraid that You have given security,
I am the hungry that You have satiated,
I am the thirsty that You have watered,
I am the naked that You have dressed,
I am the poor that You have given affluence,
I am the weak that You have strengthened,
I am the lowly that You have given might,
I am the ill that You have cured,
I am the beggar that You have donated,
I am the sinner that You have covered,
I am the guilty that You have excused,
I am the valueless that You have evaluated,
I am the helpless that You have backed,
and I am the expelled that You have boarded.

segments.arabic: أَنَا يَا رَبِّ ٱلَّذِي لَمْ أَسْتَحْيِكَ فِي ٱلْخَلاَءِ
segments.translation: I am, O my Lord, the one who has not felt ashamed of You in secrets
segments.transliteration: ana ya rabbi alladhi lam astahyika fi alkhala'i

segments.translation: and the one who has not considered Your watching over him in the public.
I am the committer of the grave transgressions,
I am the one who challenged his Master,
I am the one who disobeyed the All-great of the heavens,

segments.arabic: أَنَا ٱلَّذِي أَعْطَيْتُ عَلَىٰ مَعَاصِي ٱلْجَلِيلِ ٱلرِّشَىٰ
segments.translation: I am the one who has given bribes violating the laws of the All-lofty Lord,
segments.transliteration: ana alladhi a`taytu `ala ma`asi aljalili alrrisha

segments.arabic: أَنَا ٱلَّذِي حِينَ بُشِّرْتُ بِهَا خَرَجْتُ إِلَيْهَا أَسْعَىٰ
segments.translation: I am the one who has been delighted for committing such sins,
segments.transliteration: ana alladhi hina bushshirtu biha kharajtu ilayha as`a

segments.translation: I am the one who, although You have respited, has not cared,
I am the one whom, although You have covered him, has not felt ashamed,
who committed so many acts of disobedience that he has violated (all terms),
and who, although You have disregarded, has not minded.
So, out of Your forbearance have You given me respite.
You have concealed (my faults) with Your untouchable concealment as if You have been unaware of my acts.
segments.transliteration: wa bisitrika satartani hatta ka'annaka aghfaltani

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ عُقُوبَاتِ ٱلْمَعَاصِي جَنَّبْتَنِي حَتَّىٰ كَأَنَّكَ ٱسْتَحْيَيْتَنِي
segments.translation: You have not applied to me the punishments of committing acts of disobedience (to You) as if You are ashamed to face me.
segments.transliteration: wa min `uqubati alma`asi jannabtani hatta ka'annaka istahyaytani

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي لَمْ أَعْصِكَ حِينَ عَصَيْتُكَ وَأَنَا بِرُبُوبِيَّتِكَ جَاحِدٌ
segments.translation: O my God, as I disobeyed You, I have never denied Your Lordship,
segments.transliteration: ilahi lam a`sika hina `asaytuka wa ana birububiyyatika jahidun

segments.translation: have never belittled Your ordains,
have never wished for exposing myself to Your chastisement,
and have never disparaged Your threat.

segments.arabic: لَكِنْ خَطِيئَةٌ عَرَضَتْ وَسَوَّلَتْ لِي نَفْسِي
segments.translation: Nevertheless, sins showed themselves desirable before me, my self commended to me,
segments.transliteration: lakin khati'atun `aradat wa sawwalat li nafsi

segments.translation: my whim overwhelmed me,
my impudence helped me accordingly,
and I have been deceived by Your covering that You have laid on me.
So, I have exerted efforts in violating Your orders and disobeying You.
Now, who can ever save me from Your chastisement?

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ أَيْدِي ٱلْخُصَمَاءِ غَداً مَنْ يُخَلِّصُنِي
segments.translation: Tomorrow, who can save me from the hands of my rivals?
segments.transliteration: wa min aydi alkhusama'i ghadan man yukhallisuni

segments.arabic: وَبِحَبْلِ مَنْ أَتَّصِلُ إِنْ أَنْتَ قَطَعْتَ حَبْلَكَ عَنِّي
segments.translation: Whose rope will I catch if You cut off the rope between You and me?
segments.transliteration: wa bihabli man attasilu in anta qata`ta hablaka `anni

segments.arabic: فَوَاسَوْأَتَا عَلَىٰ مَا أَحْصَىٰ كِتَابُكَ مِنْ عَمَلِي
segments.translation: Shame on me for my evildoings that Your Book has recorded.
segments.transliteration: fa wa saw'ata `ala ma ahsa kitabuka min `amaliya alladhi

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي لَوْلاَ مَا أَرْجُو مِنْ كَرَمِكَ وَسَعَةِ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.translation: Had it not been for Your generosity, the breadth of Your mercy,
segments.transliteration: lawla ma arju min karamika wa sa`ati rahmatika

segments.arabic: وَنَهْيِكَ إِيَّايَ عَنِ ٱلَّذِي لْقُنُوطِ لَقَنَطْتُ عِنْدَمَا أَتَذَكَّرُهَا
segments.translation: and Your warning me against being desperate—the matters that I hopefully depend on, I would have despaired whenever I remember my sins.
segments.transliteration: wa nahyika iyyaya `an alqunuti laqanattu `indama atadhakkaruha

segments.translation: O Greatest Besought Who has been ever besought!
O Most Favorable Hoped!
O Allah! I beseech You in the name of the liability of Islam,
I rely upon You in the name of the sanctity of the Qur’an,
in the name of my love for the Prophet; the Ummi (inhabitant of Mecca),
the Qurayshite, the Hashemite,
the Arab, the Tuhamite,
the Meccan, and the Madanite,
I hope for proximity to You.
So, do not disturb my familiarity with faith

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْ ثَوَابِي ثَوَابَ مَنْ عَبَدَ سِوَاكَ
segments.translation: and do not make my reward the same as reward given to those who serve one other than You.
segments.transliteration: wa la taj`al thawabi thawaba man `abada siwaka

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ قَوْماً آمَنُوٱ بِأَلْسِنَتِهِمْ لِيَحْقِنُوٱ بِهِ دِمَاءَهُمْ
segments.translation: Certainly, some people outwardly declared the faith so that they could prevent their blood from being shed.
segments.transliteration: fa'inna qawman amanu bi'alsinatihim liyahqinu bihi dima'ahum

segments.translation: However, they attained their goals.

segments.arabic: وَإِنَّا آمَنَّا بِكَ بِأَلْسِنَتِنَا وَقُلُوبِنَا لِتَعْفُوَ عَنَّا
segments.translation: We have believed in You by heart and tongue so that You may excuse us.
segments.transliteration: wa'inna amanna bika bi'alsinatina wa qulubina lita`fuwa `anna

segments.translation: Hence, make us attain our goals,
make firm our hope for You in our hearts,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا
segments.translation: make not our hearts to deviate after You have guided us aright,
segments.transliteration: wa la tuzigh qulubana ba`da idh hadaytana

segments.translation: and grant us from You mercy.
segments.transliteration: wa hab lana min ladunka rahmatan

segments.translation: Surely, You are the most liberal Giver.

segments.arabic: فَوَعِزَّتِكَ لَوِ ٱنْتَهَرْتَنِي مَا بَرِحْتُ مِنْ بَابِكَ
segments.translation: By Your Majesty I swear, O my Lord, even if You chide me, I shall never leave Your Door
segments.transliteration: fawa`izzatika law intahartani ma barihtu min babika

segments.translation: and I shall never stop flattering You.

segments.arabic: لِمَا أُلْهِمَ قَلْبِي مِنَ ٱلْمَعْرِفَةِ بِكَرَمِكَ وَسَعَةِ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.translation: This is because I have full acquaintance with Your (indescribable) generosity and bounty.
segments.transliteration: lima ulhima qalbi min alma`rifati bikaramika wa sa`ati rahmatika

segments.arabic: إِلَىٰ مَنْ يَذْهَبُ ٱلْعَبْدُ إِلاَّ إِلَىٰ مَوْلاهُ
segments.translation: To whom may a servant go save to his Lord?
segments.transliteration: ila man yadhhabu al`abdul illa ila mawlahu

segments.arabic: وَإِلَىٰ مَنْ يَلْتَجِئُ ٱلْمَخْلُوقُ إِلاَّ إِلَىٰ خَالِقِهِ
segments.translation: To whom may a mortal resort save to his Creator?
segments.transliteration: wa ila man yaltaji'u almakhluqu illa ila khaliqihi

segments.translation: O my God, even if You tie me with chains,
deprive me of the stream of Your bounties in the presence of people,
segments.transliteration: wa mana`tani saybaka min bayni al-ashhadi

segments.translation: divulge all my scandalous acts before the eyes of all Your servants,
order me to Hell,
and prevent me from communicating the Pious ones,
segments.transliteration: wa hulta bayni wa bayna al-abrari

segments.translation: (in spite of all that) I will never stop hoping for You,
I will never stop expecting Your pardon,
and Your love will never exit my heart.
segments.transliteration: wa la kharaja hubbuka min qalbi

segments.translation: I never forget Your graces that I enjoy
and Your having concealed my defects in the worldly abode.

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِي أَخْرِجْ حُبَّ ٱلدُّنْيَا مِنْ قَلْبِي
segments.translation: O my Master, (please) expel love for the world out of my heart,
segments.transliteration: sayyidi akhrij hubba alddunya min qalbi

segments.translation: join me with the Divinely-chosen Prophet and his Household,
segments.transliteration: wa ijma` bayni wa bayna almustafa wa alihi

segments.translation: the choicest of Your creatures and the seal of the Prophets:
segments.transliteration: khiyaratika min khalqika wa khatami alnnabiyyina

segments.arabic: مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ آلِهِ
segments.translation: Muhammad, blessings of Allah be on him and on his Household.
Move me to the rank of repentance with You,

segments.arabic: وَأَعِنِّي بِٱلْبُكَاءِ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي فَقَدْ أَفْنَيْتُ عُمْرِي
segments.translation: help me weep for myself after I have come upon the last of my age,
segments.transliteration: wa a`inni bilbuka'i `ala nafsi faqad afnaytu `umuri

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ نَزَلْتُ مَنْزِلَةَ ٱلآيِسِينَ مِنْ خَيْرِي
segments.translation: being in the manner of those who despair of any self-decency.
segments.transliteration: wa qad nazaltu manzilata al-ayisina min khayri

segments.translation: Who is then worse than I am

segments.arabic: إِنْ أَنَا نُقِلْتُ عَلَىٰ مِثْلِ حَالِي
segments.translation: when I, such being my case, will be taken to a grave
segments.transliteration: in ana nuqiltu `ala mithli hali ila qabrin

segments.translation: that I have neither paved for my long stay
nor furnished with righteous deed for my extended abode.
segments.transliteration: wa lam afrishhu bil`amali alssalihi lidaj`ati

segments.translation: Why should I not weep

segments.arabic: وَلاَ أَدْرِي إِلَىٰ مَا يَكُونُ مَصِيرِي
segments.translation: while I do not know what my destiny will be?
segments.transliteration: wa la adri ila ma yakunu masiri

segments.translation: And while I notice that my self is cheating me,
my days are deceiving me,

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ خَفَقَتْ عِنْدَ رَأْسِي أَجْنِحَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ
segments.translation: and the wings of death are fluttering over my head.
segments.transliteration: wa qad khafaqat `inda ra'si ajnihatu almawti

segments.translation: So, why should I not weep?
I weep for my soul’s departing my body.
I weep for the darkness of my grave.
I weep for the narrowness of my vault.
I weep for Munkar and Nakir (the two angels interrogating in graves) being interrogating me.
segments.transliteration: abki lisu'ali munkarin wa nakirin iyyaya

segments.arabic: أَبْكِي لِخُرُوجِي مِنْ قَبْرِي عُرْيَاناً ذَلِيلاً
segments.translation: I weep for my coming out of my grave (on the Resurrection Day) naked, humiliated,
carrying my burdens on my back,

segments.arabic: أَنْظُرُ مَرَّةً عَنْ يَمِينِي وَأُخْرَىٰ عَنْ شِمَالِي
segments.translation: distributing my sights to my right and my left.
segments.transliteration: anzuru marratan `an yamini wa ukhra `an shimali

segments.arabic: إِذِ ٱلْخَلائِقُ فِي شَأْنٍ غَيْرِ شَأْنِي
segments.translation: Behold! The creatures will each be engaged with matters other than mine.
segments.transliteration: idh alkhala'iqu fi sha'nin ghayri sha'ni

segments.translation: Every man that day will have concern enough to make him heedless of others.
segments.transliteration: likulli imri'in minhum yawma'idhin sha'nun yughnihi

segments.translation: Many faces on that day shall be bright, laughing, joyous.

segments.arabic: وَوُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَلَيْهَا غَبَرَةٌ تَرْهَقُهَا قَتَرَةٌ“ وَذِلَّةٌ
segments.translation: And many faces on that day, on them shall be dust. Darkness, and humiliation shall cover them.
segments.transliteration: wa wujuhun yawma'idhin `alayha ghabaratun tarhaquha qataratun wa dhillatun

segments.translation: O my Master, on You I depend and rely.
In You I put my hope and faith.
To Your mercy I hang.
You direct Your mercy towards whomsoever You like
and You guide, out of Your honoring, whomsoever You will.

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ مَا نَقَّيْتَ مِنَ ٱلشِّرْكِ قَلْبِي
segments.translation: So, all praise be to You for You have purified my heart from polytheism.
segments.transliteration: falaka alhamdu `ala ma naqqayta min alshshirki qalbi

segments.translation: All praise be to You for You have made my tongue express utterly.
How can I praise You properly while my tongue is too short to do so?

segments.arabic: أَمْ بِغَايَةِ جُهْدِي فِي عَمَلِي أُرْضِيكَ
segments.translation: How can I please You while the extent of my efforts is too short to do so?

segments.arabic: وَمَا قَدْرُ لِسَانِي يَا رَبِّ فِي جَنْبِ شُكْرِكَ
segments.translation: What extent can my tongue reach if compared to the limitless extent of thanking You?
segments.transliteration: wa ma qadru lisani ya rabbi fi janbi shukrika

segments.arabic: وَمَا قَدْرُ عَمَلِي فِي جَنْبِ نِعَمِكَ وَإِحْسَانِكَ
segments.translation: What amount can my efforts reach if compared to the limitless amount of Your graces and favors?
segments.transliteration: wa ma qadru `amali fi janbi ni`amika wa ihsanika

segments.translation: O my God! It is certainly Your benevolence that has given me hope.
It is my thanks to You that have granted approval for my deeds.
O my Master, for You do I desire,
You do I fear,
and to You do I look forward.
It is my hope that has driven me towards You.
To You, O my One and Only God, do I direct my determination.
Towards what You have in possession are my desires directed.
For You is the ultimate of my hope and fear.
segments.transliteration: wa laka khalisu raja'i wa khawfi

segments.translation: With You have I become familiar.
To You have I submitted my hand.
To the rope of obedience to You have I extended my fears.
O my Master, only through mentioning You have my heart lived.
Only through my confidential conversations with You have I cooled the pains of my fear.

segments.arabic: فَيَا مَوْلايَ وَيَا مُؤَمَّلِي وَيَا مُنْتَهَىٰ سُؤْلِي
segments.translation: So, O my Master! O my Trusty Patron! O Ultimate Hope!
segments.transliteration: faya mawlaya wa ya mu'ammali wa ya muntaha su'li

segments.arabic: فَرِّقْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ ذَنْبِيَ ٱلْمَانِعِ لِي مِنْ لُزُومِ طَاعَتِكَ
segments.translation: Separate me from my transgressions which prevent me from adhering to the obedience to You.
segments.transliteration: farriq bayni wa bayna dhanbiya almani`i li min luzumi ta`atika

segments.translation: I only pray You on account of my eternal faith in You
and my desire for Your mercy and kindness

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي أَوْجَبْتَهُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِكَ مِنَ ٱلرَّأْفَةِ وَٱلرَّحْمَةِ
segments.translation: that You have made incumbent upon Yourself.
segments.transliteration: alladhi awjabtahu `ala nafsika min alrra'fati walrrahmati

segments.arabic: فَٱلأَمْرُ لَكَ وَحْدَكَ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَكَ
segments.translation: So, the whole affair is Yours alone. There is no partner with You at all.
segments.transliteration: fal-amru laka wahdaka la sharika laka

segments.translation: All the creatures are dependent upon You and are in Your grip.
All things are submissive to You.
Blessed be You, O Lord of the worlds.
O my God, have mercy on me when my argument is proven nil,
when my tongue can no longer find any answer,
and when my mind scatters as soon as You start interrogating me.

segments.arabic: فَيَا عَظِيمَ رَجَائِي لاَ تُخَيِّبْنِي إِذَا ٱشْتَدَّتْ فَاقَتِي
segments.translation: So, O my great hope, do not forsake me when my need terribly increases,
segments.transliteration: faya `azima raja'i la tukhayyibni idha ishtaddat faqati

segments.translation: do not reject me on account of my ignorance,
and do not stop conferring upon me on account of my lack of patience.
Grant me for I am poor.
Have mercy upon me for I am weak.
O my Master, on You do I rely and lean.
You are my hope, and in You do I have faith.
To Your mercy do I attach myself.
In Your courtyard do I dwell.
On account of Your benevolence do I declare my request.
With Your generosity, O my Lord, do I begin my prayers.
segments.transliteration: wa bikaramika ay rabbi astaftihu du`a'i

segments.translation: With You do I desire for meeting my needs.
Through Your wealth do I settle my poverty.
Under the shade of Your pardon do I stand.
Towards Your benevolence and generosity do I raise my sight.
segments.transliteration: wa ila judika wa karamika arfa`u basari

segments.translation: I persistently look for Your favors;

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تُحْرِقْنِي بِٱلنَّارِ وَأَنْتَ مَوْضِعُ أَمَلِي
segments.translation: so, do not let the flames of the Fire consume me while You are my ultimate hope,
segments.transliteration: fala tuhriqni bilnnari wa anta mawdi`u amali

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُسْكِنِّي ٱلْهَاوِيَةَ فَإِنَّكَ قُرَّةُ عَيْنِي
segments.translation: and do not embed me in the deep black abyss while You are the delight of my eyes.
segments.transliteration: wa la tuskinni alhawiyata fa'innaka qurratu `ayni

segments.arabic: يَا سَيِّدِي لاَ تُكَذِّبْ ظَنِّي بِإِحْسَانِكَ وَمَعْرُوفِكَ
segments.translation: O my Master, do not thwart my idea about Your grace and favors,
segments.transliteration: ya sayyidi la tukadhdhib zanni bi'ihsanika wa ma`rufika

segments.translation: for in You I trust.
Do not deprive me of Your rewards,
for You best know my poverty.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كَانَ قَدْ دَنَا أَجَلِي وَلَمْ يُقَرِّبْنِي مِنْكَ عَمَلِي
segments.translation: O my God, if my death is drawing near while my deeds have not yet drawn me near You,
segments.transliteration: ilahi in kana qad dana ajali wa lam yuqarribni minka `amali

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ جَعَلْتُ ٱلإِعْتِرَافَ إِلَيْكَ بِذَنْبِي وَسَائِلَ عِلَلِي
segments.translation: then let my confession of having committed sins be my means of justification.
segments.transliteration: faqad ja`altu ali`tirafa ilayka bidhanbi wasa'ila `ilali

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ عَفَوْتَ فَمَنْ أَوْلَىٰ مِنْكَ بِٱلْعَفْوِ
segments.translation: O my God, if You forgive, then who is worthier than You in forgiveness?
segments.transliteration: ilahi in `afawta faman awla minka bil`afwi

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ عَذَّبْتَ فَمَنْ أَعْدَلُ مِنْكَ فِي ٱلْحُكْمِ
segments.translation: And if You punish, then who is fairer than You in judgment?
segments.transliteration: wa in `adhdhabta faman a`dalu minka fi allhukmi

segments.translation: Have mercy on my misery in this world,
on my grief at the time of death,
on my loneliness in the grave,
on my lonesomeness in the underground hole,

segments.arabic: وَإِذَا نُشِرْتُ لِلْحِسَابِ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ ذُلَّ مَوْقِفِي
segments.translation: and on my humiliating situation when I shall be resurrected for account before You.
segments.transliteration: wa idha nushirtu lilhisabi bayna yadayka dhulla mawqifi

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِي مَا خَفِيَ عَلَىٰ ٱلآدَمِيِّينَ مِنْ عَمَلِي
segments.translation: Forgive my deeds that have been concealed from the other human beings,
segments.transliteration: waghfir li ma khafiya `ala al-adamiyyina min `amali

segments.translation: make permanent for me that on account of which You have covered my faults,
segments.transliteration: wa adim li ma bihi satartani

segments.arabic: وَٱرْحَمْنِي صَرِيعاً عَلَىٰ ٱلْفِرَاشِ تُقَلِّبُنِي أَيْدِي أَحِبَّتِي
segments.translation: have mercy on me when I am thrown on the death bed turned over at the hands of my dear ones,
segments.transliteration: warhamni sari`an `ala alfirashi tuqallibuni aydi ahibbati

segments.arabic: وَتَفَضَّلْ عَلَيَّ مَمْدُوداً عَلَىٰ ٱلْمُغْتَسَلِ يُقَلِّبُنِي صَالِحُ جِيرَتِي
segments.translation: do a favor to me when I am laid on the table of the dead bathroom turned over at the hands of my righteous neighbors,
segments.transliteration: wa tafaddal `alayya mamdudan `ala almughtasali yuqallibuni salihu jirati

segments.arabic: وَتَحَنَّنْ عَلَيَّ مَحْمُولاً قَدْ تَنَاوَلَ ٱلأَقْرِبَاءُ أَطْرَافَ جِنَازَتِي
segments.translation: act kindly towards me when I am carried while my relatives hold the edges of my coffin,
segments.transliteration: wa tahannan `alayya mahmulan qad tanawala al-aqriba'u atrafa janazati

segments.arabic: وَجُدْ عَلَيَّ مَنْقُولاً قَدْ نَزَلْتُ بِكَ وَحِيداً فِي حُفْرَتِي
segments.translation: be generous with me when I am carried, alone, to my hole,
segments.transliteration: wa jud `alayya manqulan qad nazaltu bika wahidan fi hufrati

segments.arabic: وَٱرْحَمْ فِي ذٰلِكَ ٱلْبَيْتِ ٱلْجَدِيدِ غُرْبَتِي حَتَّىٰ لاَ أَسْتَأْنِسَ بِغَيْرِكَ
segments.translation: have mercy on my loneliness in that (new) dwelling so that I will not feel at ease with anyone other than You.
segments.transliteration: warham fi dhalika albayti aljadidi ghurbati hatta la asta'nisa bighayrika

segments.arabic: يَا سَيِّدِي إِنْ وَكَلْتَنِي إِلَىٰ نَفْسِي هَلَكْتُ
segments.translation: O my Master, if You leave me for myself, I will certainly perish.
segments.transliteration: ya sayyidi in wakaltani ila nafsi halaktu

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِي فَبِمَنْ أَسْتَغِيثُ إِنْ لَمْ تُقِلْنِي عَثْرَتِي
segments.translation: O my Master, to whom will I resort if You do not overlook my slips?
segments.transliteration: sayyidi fabiman astaghithu in lam tuqilni `athrati

segments.arabic: فَإِلَىٰ مَنْ أَفْزَعُ إِنْ فَقَدْتُ عِنَايَتَكَ فِي ضَجْعَتِي
segments.translation: To whom will I run for help if I miss Your care for me in my stay (in grave)?
segments.transliteration: fa'ila man afza`u in faqadtu `inayataka fi daj`ati

segments.arabic: وَإِلَىٰ مَنْ أَلْتَجِئُ إِنْ لَمْ تُنَفِّسْ كُرْبَتِي
segments.translation: To whom will I refer if You do not relieve my grief?
segments.transliteration: wa'ila man altaji'u in lam tunaffis kurbati

segments.translation: O my Master! Who will be with me?
Who will have mercy on me if You do not?
segments.transliteration: wa man yarhamuni in lam tarhamni

segments.arabic: وَفَضْلَ مَنْ أُؤَمِّلُ إِنْ عَدِمْتُ فَضْلَكَ يَوْمَ فَاقَتِي
segments.translation: Whose favor will I expect if I miss Your favors on the day of my neediness?
segments.transliteration: wa fadla man u'ammilu in `adimtu fadlaka yawma faqati

segments.arabic: وَإِلَىٰ مَنِ ٱلْفِرَارُ مِنَ ٱلذُّنُوبِ إِذَا ٱنْقَضَىٰ أَجَلِي
segments.translation: To whom will I flee from my sins when my deadline comes?
segments.transliteration: wa'ila man alfararu min aldhdhunubi idha inqada ajali

segments.translation: O my Master, do not punish me while I please You hopefully.
segments.transliteration: sayyidi la tu`adhdhibni wa ana arjuka

segments.translation: O my God, (please do) give success to my expectations
and dispel my fear.

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ كَثْرَةَ ذُنُوبِي لاَ أَرْجُو فِيهَا إِلاَّ عَفْوَكَ
segments.translation: As for my numerous sins, I hope for nothing other than Your pardon.
segments.transliteration: fa'inna kathrata dhunubi la arju fiha illa `afwaka

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِي أَنَا أَسْأَلُكَ مَا لاَ أَسْتَحِقُّ
segments.translation: O my Master, I am asking You for things that I do not deserve
segments.transliteration: sayyidi ana as'aluka ma la astahiqqu

segments.translation: and You are verily the worthiest of being feared and the worthiest of forgiving.
segments.transliteration: wa anta ahlu alttaqwa wa ahlu almaghfirati

segments.arabic: فَٱغْفِرْ لِي وَأَلْبِسْنِي مِنْ نَظَرِكَ ثَوْباً يُغَطِّي عَلَيَّ ٱلتَّبِعَاتِ
segments.translation: So, forgive me and dress me, out of Your relief, a garment covering all my defects,
segments.transliteration: faghfir li wa albisni min nazarika thawban yughatti `alayya alttabi`ati

segments.translation: and forgive them for me so that I will not be responsible for them.
segments.transliteration: wa taghfiruha li wa la utalabu biha

segments.translation: Verily, You are the Lord of eternal favoring,
great pardon,
and liberal exoneration.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي أَنْتَ ٱلَّذِي تُفِيضُ سَيْبَكَ عَلَىٰ مَنْ لاَ يَسْأَلُكَ
segments.translation: O my God, You make Your flowing graces reach those who never pray You
segments.transliteration: ilahi anta alladhi tufidu saybaka `ala man la yas'aluka

segments.translation: and those who deny Your Lordship.

segments.arabic: فَكَيْفَ سَيِّدِي بِمَنْ سَأَلَكَ وَأَيْقَنَ أَنَّ ٱلْخَلْقَ لَكَ وَٱلأَمْرَ إِلَيْكَ
segments.translation: So, O my Master, what should You do to those who pray You and believe undoubtedly that You manage all creation and all affairs!
segments.transliteration: fakayfa sayyidi biman sa'alaka wa ayqana anna alkhalqa laka wal-amra ilayka

segments.translation: Blessed by You and Exalted be You, O Lord of the worlds!
segments.transliteration: tabarakta wa ta`alayta ya rabba al`alamina

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِي عَبْدُكَ بِبَابِكَ أَقَامَتْهُ ٱلْخَصَاصَةُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ
segments.translation: O my Master, I, Your servant, am standing at Your door owing to neediness,
segments.transliteration: sayyidi `abduka bibabika aqamat-hu alkhasasatu bayna yadayka

segments.translation: am knocking at it suppliantly.
So, do not turn Your generous Face away from me.

segments.arabic: وَٱقْبَلْ مِنِّي مَا أَقُولُ فَقَدْ دَعَوْتُ بِهٰذَا ٱلدُّعَاءِ
segments.translation: Accept that which I utter, for I have prayed using this supplication,
segments.transliteration: waqbal minni ma aqulu faqad da`awtu bihadha alddu`a'i

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا أَرْجُو أَنْ لاَ تَرُدَّنِي مَعْرِفَةً مِنِّي بِرَأْفَتِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.translation: hoping that You will not reject me since I have full awareness of Your kindness and mercifulness.
segments.transliteration: wa ana arju an la taruddani ma`rifatan minni bira'fatika wa rahmatika

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي أَنْتَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُحْفِيكَ سَائِلٌ
segments.translation: O my God, it is You Whom is never disturbed by any suppliant
segments.transliteration: ilahi anta alladhi la yuhfika sa'ilun

segments.translation: and Whose kingdom is never decreased owing to donations.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ كَمَا تَقُولُ وَفَوْقَ مَا نَقُولُ
segments.translation: You are as exactly as You describe Yourself and is above all that which we say.
segments.transliteration: anta kama taqulu wa fawqa ma naqulu

segments.translation: O Allah, I beseech You for comely patience,
immediate relief,
truthful wording,
and splendid reward.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ يَا رَبِّ مِنَ ٱلْخَيْرِ كُلِّهِ
segments.translation: I pray You, O Lord, for all goodness,
segments.transliteration: as'aluka ya rabbi min alkhayri kullihi

segments.arabic: مَا عَلِمْتُ مِنْهُ وَمَا لَمْ أَعْلَمْ
segments.translation: be it known by me or unknown.
segments.transliteration: ma `alimtu minhu wa ma lam a`lam

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ ٱللَّهُمَّ مِنْ خَيْرِ مَا سَأَلَكَ مِنْهُ عِبَادُكَ ٱلصَّالِحُونَ
segments.translation: I pray You, O Allah, for the goodness that Your righteous servants have besought from You.
segments.transliteration: as'aluka allahumma min khayri ma sa'alaka minhu `ibaduka alssalihuna

segments.translation: O All-excellent One that is asked!
O most benevolent of those who may give!
(Please do) respond to my request as regards myself, my family,
segments.transliteration: a`tini su'li fi nafsi wa ahli

segments.translation: my parents, my children,
my comrades, and my brothers-in-faith.
segments.transliteration: wa ahli huzanati wa ikhwani fika

segments.translation: Bless my living,
manifest my integrity,
set aright all my affairs,
and include me with those whom You decide to live long,
whose deeds are righteous,
those for whom You have perfected Your favors, those with whom You are pleased,

segments.arabic: وَأَحْيَيْتَهُ حَيَاةً طَيِّبَةً فِي أَدْوَمِ ٱلسُّرُورِ
segments.translation: and those whom You have granted comfortable life with permanent pleasure,
segments.transliteration: wa ahyaytahu hayatan tayyibatan fi adwami alssururi

segments.translation: reputable honor, and perfect contentment.
segments.transliteration: wa asbaghi alkaramati wa atammi al`ayshi

segments.translation: Verily, You do whatever You will,
while none else can ever do what one wills.
segments.transliteration: wa la yaf`alu ma yasha'u ghayruka

segments.translation: O Allah, give me exclusively the grace of private mention of You,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْ شَيْئاً مِمَّا أَتَقَرَّبُ بِهِ
segments.translation: do not let any of the things by which I seek Your nearness
segments.transliteration: wa la taj`al shay'an mimma ataqarrabu bihi

segments.translation: in the hours of the night and the ends of the days
segments.transliteration: fi ana'i allayli wa atrafi alnnahari

segments.translation: take the form of ostentation, showing off,
pretension, or insolence.
segments.transliteration: wa la asharan wa la bataran

segments.translation: Include me with the humble ones.
O Allah, grant me affluent means of livelihood,
security in my homeland,

segments.arabic: وَقُرَّةَ ٱلْعَيْنِ فِي ٱلأَهْلِ وَٱلْمَالِ وَٱلْوَلَدِ
segments.translation: delight in my family, property, and children,
segments.transliteration: wa qurrata al`ayni fi al-ahli walmali walwaladi

segments.translation: permanence of Your graces,
healthy body,
strong physique,
and sound faith.
Dedicate my affairs to the obedience to You and to Your Messenger,

segments.arabic: مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ آلِهِ أَبَداً مَا ٱسْتَعْمَرْتَنِي
segments.translation: Muhammad—Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household—as long as You give me life.
segments.transliteration: muhammadin salla allahu `alayhi wa `ala alihi abadan ma ista`martani

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْنِي مِنْ أَوْفَرِ عِبَادِكَ عِنْدَكَ نَصِيباً
segments.translation: Make me one of the most rewarded servants of You

segments.arabic: فِي كُلِّ خَيْرٍ أَنْزَلْتَهُ وَتُنْزِلُهُ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
segments.translation: in each and every item of goodness that You have descended and You will descend during the month of Ramadan
segments.transliteration: fi kulli khayrin anzaltahu wa tunziluhu fi shahri ramadana

segments.translation: and at the Destiny Night

segments.arabic: وَمَا أَنْتَ مُنْزِلُهُ فِي كُلِّ سَنَةٍ مِنْ رَحْمَةٍ تَنْشُرُهَا
segments.translation: as well as all that which You decide to descend throughout the year, including mercy that You spread,
segments.transliteration: wa ma anta munziluhu fi kulli sanatin min rahmatin tunshiruha

segments.translation: good health with which You adorn,
misfortune that You repel,
good deeds that You admit,
and evildoings that You excuse.

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي حَجَّ بَيْتِكَ ٱلْحَرَامِ فِي عَامِنَا هٰذَا وَفِي كُلِّ عَامٍ
segments.translation: Bestow upon me with pilgrimage to Your Holy House in this year plus all years,
segments.transliteration: warzuqni hajja baytika alharami fi `amina hadha wa fi kulli `amin

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي رِزْقاً وَاسِعاً مِنْ فَضْلِكَ ٱلْوَاسِعِ
segments.translation: grant me prosperous sustenance out of Your limitless bounty,
segments.transliteration: warzuqni rizqan wasi`an min fadlika alwasi`i

segments.translation: dismiss, O my Master, all evils from me,

segments.arabic: وَٱقْضِ عَنِّي ٱلدَّيْنَ وَٱلظًُّلاَمَاتِ حَتَّىٰ لاَ أَتَأَذَّىٰ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْهُ
segments.translation: help me settle my debts as well as my evildoings so that I will be saved from their liabilities,
segments.transliteration: waqdi `anni alddayna walzzulamati hatta la ata'adhadha bishay'in minhu

segments.arabic: وَخُذْ عَنِّي بِأَسْمَاعِ وَأَبْصَارِ أَعْدَائِي وَحُسَّادِي وَٱلْبَاغِينَ عَلَيَّ
segments.translation: save me from the hearings and sights of my enemies, those who envy me, and those who intend to oppress me,
segments.transliteration: wa khudh `anni bi'asma`i wa'absari a`da'i wa hussadi walbaghina `alayya

segments.translation: back me against them,
give delight to my eye and joy to my heart,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ هَمِّي وَكَرْبِي فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً
segments.translation: grant me relief and exit against my grief and misery,
segments.transliteration: waj`al li min hammi wa karbi farajan wa makhrajan

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ مَنْ أَرَادَنِي بِسُوءٍ مِنْ جَمِيعِ خَلْقِكَ تَحْتَ قَدَمَيَّ
segments.translation: make all those who intend evil to me, among all Your creatures, be under my feet,
segments.transliteration: waj`al man aradani bisu'in min jami`i khalqika tahta qadamayya

segments.translation: protect me against the evil of Satan,
the evil of the ruling authority,
and the consequences of my evildoings,
purify me from all my sins,
save me from Hellfire on account of Your pardon,
allow me to enter Paradise on account of Your mercy,
marry me off the Paradisiacal women on account of Your grace,
segments.transliteration: wa zawwijni min alhuri al`ini bifadlika

segments.translation: and join me to Your righteous intimate servants—Muhammad and his Household,
segments.transliteration: wa alhiqni bi'awliya'aka alssalihina muhammadin wa alihi

segments.translation: the purified, the immaculate, and the pious.

segments.arabic: صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ أَجْسَادِهِمْ وَأَرْوَاحِهِمْ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
segments.translation: May Your peace, mercy, and blessings be upon their bodies and souls.
segments.transliteration: salawatuka `alayhim wa `ala ajsadihim wa arwahihim wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

segments.translation: O my God and my Master, I swear by Your Mighty and Your Glory,
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa sayyidi wa `izzatika wa jalalika

segments.translation: if You will interrogate me for my sins, I will demand with Your pardon.
If You interrogate me for my meanness, I will demand with Your kindness.
segments.transliteration: wa la'in talabtani bilu'mi la'utalibannaka bikaramika

segments.arabic: وَلَئِنْ أَدْخَلْتَنِي ٱلنَّارَ َلأُخْبِرَنَّ أَهْلَ ٱلنَّارِ بِحُبِّي لَكَ
segments.translation: If You order me to Hellfire, I will tell all the inhabitants therein that I love You.
segments.transliteration: wa la'in adkhaltani alnnara la'ukhbiranna ahla alnnari bihubbi laka

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي وَسَيِّدِي إِنْ كُنْتَ لاَ تَغْفِرُ إِلاَّ لأَوْلِيَائِكَ وَأَهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ
segments.translation: O my God and Master, if you forgive only Your intimate servants and those who obey You,
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa sayyidi in kunta la taghfiru illa li'awliya'ika wa ahli ta`atika

segments.translation: to whom then will the sinful resort?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ كُنْتَ لاَ تُكْرِمُ إِلاَّ أَهْلَ ٱلْوَفَاءِ بِكَ
segments.translation: If You honor none but those who act loyally to You,
segments.transliteration: wa in kunta la tukrimu illa ahla alwafa'i bika

segments.translation: then whose shelter will the evildoers seek?

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ أَدْخَلْتَنِي ٱلنَّارَ فَفِي ذٰلِكَ سُرُورُ عَدُوِّكَ
segments.translation: O my God, if You decide to put me in Hellfire, this will definitely please Your enemies!
segments.transliteration: ilahi in adkhaltani alnnara fafi dhalika sururu `aduwwika

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ أَدْخَلْتَنِي ٱلْجَنَّةَ فَفِي ذٰلِكَ سُرُورُ نَبِيِّكَ
segments.translation: But if You decide Paradise for me, then this will certainly please Your Prophet!
segments.transliteration: wa in adkhaltani aljannata fafi dhalika sururu nabiyyika

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا وَٱللَّهِ أَعْلَمُ أَنَّ سُرُورَ نَبِيِّكَ أَحَبُّ إِلَيْكَ مِنْ سُرُورِ عَدُوِّكَ
segments.translation: And I—by Allah I swear it—know for sure that the pleasure of Your Prophet is more favorable for You than the pleasure of Your enemies.
segments.transliteration: wa ana wallahi a`lamu anna surura nabiyyika ahabbu ilayka min sururi `aduwwika

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَمْلأَ قَلْبِي حُبّاً لَكَ
segments.translation: O Allah, I pray You for filling my heart with love for You,
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka an tamla'a qalbi hubban laka

segments.translation: with fear of You,
with belief in Your Book,
with faith in You,
with dread from You,
and with eagerness to You.

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا ٱلْجَلالِ وَٱلإِكْرَامِ حَبِّبْ إِلَيَّ لِقَاءَكَ
segments.translation: O Lord of Glory and Honor, (please do) make me love meeting You,
segments.transliteration: ya dha aljalali wal-ikrami habbib ilayya liqa'aka

segments.translation: (please do) love my meeting,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ لِي فِي لِقَائِكَ ٱلرَّاحَةَ وَٱلْفَرَجَ وَٱلْكَرَامَةَ
segments.translation: and make my meeting You entail comfort, relief, and honoring.
segments.transliteration: waj`al li fi liqa'ika alrrahata walfaraja walkaramata

segments.translation: O Allah, join me with the righteous ones among the past generations,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْنِي مِنْ صَالِحِ مَنْ بَقِيَ وَخُذْ بِي سَبِيلَ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ
segments.translation: include me with the righteous ones of this generation, guide me to the path of the righteous ones,
segments.transliteration: waj`alni min salihi man baqiya wa khudh bi sabila alssalihina

segments.arabic: وَأَعِنِّي عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي بِمَا تُعِينُ بِهِ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ عَلَىٰ أَنْفُسِهِمْ
segments.translation: help me against myself in just as You help the righteous ones control themselves,
segments.transliteration: wa a`inni `ala nafsi bima tu`inu bihi alssalihina `ala anfusihim

segments.translation: seal my deed with the best of it,
decide Paradise as the reward of my deeds on account of Your mercy,
help me manage the good things that You have endowed upon me,

segments.arabic: وَثَبِّتْنِي يَا رَبِّ وَلاَ تَرُدَّنِي فِي سُوءٍ ٱسْتَنْقَذْتَنِي مِنْهُ
segments.translation: make me firm, O Lord, and do not make me return to evildoing after You have saved me from it.
segments.transliteration: wa thabbitni ya rabbi wa la taruddani fi su'in istanqadhtani minhu

segments.translation: O Lord of the worlds!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ إِيـمَاناً لاَ أَجَلَ لَهُ دُونَ لِقَائِكَ
segments.translation: O Allah, I beseech You for faith that does not stop until I meet You.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka imanan la ajala lahu duna liqa'ika

segments.translation: As long as You grant me lifetime, (please do) connect me to that faith,
and when You decide to grasp my soul, make me carry that faith with me.
When You resurrect me, make me carry it with me.

segments.arabic: وَأَبْرِئْ قَلْبِي مِنَ ٱلرِّيَاءِ وَٱلشَّكِّ وَٱلسُّمْعَةِ فِي دِينِكَ
segments.translation: Release my heart from showing off, suspicion, and pretension in the affairs of Your religion
segments.transliteration: wa abri' qalbi min alrriya'i walshshakki walssum`ati fi dinika

segments.translation: so that my deed will be purely intended for Your sake.
O Allah, grant me discerning awareness in Your religion,
understanding of Your laws,
insight in Your knowledge,
two folds of Your mercy,
and piety that impedes me from disobeying You.
Make my face glitter on account of Your light,
make me desire for nothing but that which You hold,

segments.arabic: وَتَوَفَّنِي فِي سَبِيلِكَ وَعَلَىٰ مِلَّةِ رَسُولِكَ
segments.translation: and when I die, make me die following Your Path and carrying the principles of Your Prophet—
segments.transliteration: wa tawaffani fi sabilika wa `ala millati rasulika

segments.translation: Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ ٱلْكَسَلِ وَٱلْفَشَلِ
segments.translation: O Allah, I seek Your protection against laziness, failure,
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika min alkasali walfashali

segments.translation: grief, cowardice, stinginess,
inattentiveness, brutality, poverty,
neediness, destitution,

segments.arabic: وَكُلِّ بَلِيَّةٍ وَٱلْفَوَاحِشِ مَا ظَهَرَ مِنْهَا وَمَا بَطَنَ
segments.translation: and against all misfortunes and all shameful deeds, whether open or secret.
segments.transliteration: wa kulli baliyyatin walfawahishi ma zahara minha wa ma batana

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ نَفْسٍ لاَ تَقْنَعُ
segments.translation: I seek Your protection against having unsatisfied self,
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min nafsin la taqna`u

segments.translation: insatiate stomach,
fearless heart,
unanswered prayers,
and futile deed.

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ يَا رَبِّ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي وَدِينِي وَمَالِي
segments.translation: I ask You, O Lord, to guard myself, my religion, my properties,
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika ya rabbi `ala nafsi wa dini wa mali

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ مَا رَزَقْتَنِي مِنَ ٱلشَّيْطَانِ ٱلرَّجِيمِ
segments.translation: and all that which You have granted me against Satan the accursed.
segments.transliteration: wa `ala jami`i ma razaqtani min alshshaytani alrrajimi

segments.translation: Verily, You are the All-hearing, the All-knowing.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّهُ لاَ يُجِيرُنِي مِنْكَ أَحَدٌ
segments.translation: O Allah, none can ever save me against You
segments.transliteration: allahumma innahu la yujiruni minka ahadun

segments.translation: and I can never find any shelter against You.
segments.transliteration: wa la ajidu min dunika multahadan

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تَجْعَلْ نَفْسِي فِي شَيْءٍ مِنْ عَذَابِكَ
segments.translation: So, (please) do not make anything that brings about Your punishment control over me,
segments.transliteration: fala taj`al nafsi fi shay'in min `adhabika

segments.translation: do not let me lead myself to perdition,
and do not make me deserve the painful chastisement.
O Allah, accept from me,
grant me reputation,
elevate my rank,
exonerate my offenses,
do not refer to me with my faults,
let the reward of my sessions,
my utterance,
and my prayer be Your pleasure and Paradise.

segments.arabic: وَأَعْطِنِي يَا رَبِّ جَمِيعَ مَا سَأَلْتُكَ وَزِدْنِي مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
segments.translation: Give me, O Lord, all that which I have asked for from You and grant me more favor,
segments.transliteration: wa a`tini ya rabbi jami`a ma sa'altuka wa zidni min fadlika

segments.arabic: إِنِّي إِلَيْكَ رَاغِبٌ يَا رَبَّ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.translation: for I seek none but You, O Lord of the worlds!
segments.transliteration: inni ilayka raghibun ya rabba al`alamina

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ أَنْزَلْتَ فِي كِتَابِكَ أَنْ نَعْفُوَ عَمَّنْ ظَلَمَنَا
segments.translation: O Allah, You have ordered us in Your book that we should overlook those who wrong us.
segments.transliteration: allahumma innaka anzalta fi kitabika an na`fuwa `amman zalamana

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ ظَلَمْنَا أَنْفُسَنَا فَٱعْفُ عَنَّا فَإِنَّكَ أَوْلَىٰ بِذٰلِكَ مِنَّا
segments.translation: We have thus wronged ourselves; so, forgive us, for You are worthier of forgiveness than we are.
segments.transliteration: wa qad zalamna anfusana fa`fu `anna fa'innaka awla bidhalika minna

segments.arabic: وَأَمَرْتَنَا أَنْ لاَ نَرُدَّ سَائِلاً عَنْ أَبْوَابِنَا
segments.translation: You have ordered us not to reject any beggar being on our doors.
segments.transliteration: wa amartana an la narudda sa'ilan `an abwabina

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ جِئْتُكَ سَائِلاً فَلاَ تَرُدَّنِي إِلاَّ بِقَضَاءِ حَاجَتِي
segments.translation: Here I am begging You; so, do not reject me; rather, respond to my need.
segments.transliteration: wa qad ji'tuka sa'ilan fala taruddani illa biqada'i hajati

segments.arabic: وَأَمَرْتَنَا بِٱلإِحْسَانِ إِلَىٰ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُنَا
segments.translation: You have ordered us to act nicely to those under our authorities.
segments.transliteration: wa amartana bil-ihsani ila ma malakat aymanuna

segments.arabic: وَنَحْنُ أَرِقَّاؤُكَ فَأَعْتِقْ رِقَابَنَا مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
segments.translation: We are surely under Your authority; so, release us from Hellfire.
segments.transliteration: wa nahnu ariqqa'uka fa'a`tiq riqabana min alnnari

segments.translation: O my Shelter whenever I am aggrieved!
O my Aid whenever hardships hit me!
To You have I resorted.
With You have I sought refuge and haven.
To none save You shall I ever resort.
From none save You shall I ever seek for relief.
segments.transliteration: wa la atlubu alfaraja illa minka

segments.translation: So, (please do) aid me and relieve my hardship.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَقْبَلُ ٱلْيَسِيرَ وَيَعْفُو عَنِ ٱلْكَثِيرِ
segments.translation: O He Who accepts the little (deed) and overlooks the much (wrong)!
segments.transliteration: ya man yaqbalu alyasira wa ya`fu `an alkathira

segments.arabic: ٱقْبَلْ مِنِّيَ ٱلْيَسِيرَ وَٱعْفُ عَنِّيَ ٱلْكَثِيرَ
segments.translation: Accept my little (deed) and overlook my much (wrong).
You are certainly the All-merciful, the All-forgiving.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ إِيـمَاناً تُبَاشِرُ بِهِ قَلْبِي
segments.translation: O Allah, I pray You for faith that covers my heart
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka imanan tubashiru bihi qalbi

segments.arabic: وَيَقِيناً صَادِقاً حَتَّىٰ أَعْلَمَ أَنَّهُ لَنْ يُصِيبَنِي إِلاَّ مَا كَتَبْتَ لِي
segments.translation: and for honest conviction so that I will believe that nothing will inflict me save that about which You have already known.
segments.transliteration: wa yaqinan sadiqan hatta a`lama annahu lan yusibani illa ma katabta li

segments.arabic: وَرَضِّنِي مِنَ ٱلْعَيْشِ بِمَا قَسَمْتَ لِي
segments.translation: Make me be satisfied with my livelihood that You have decided for me.
segments.transliteration: wa raddini min al`ayshi bima qasamta li

segments.translation: O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
